entries.name: Windwright's Intuition
entries: When you make a Dexterity ({@skill Acrobatics|XPHB}) check or an ability check using {@item Navigator's Tools|XPHB}, you can roll {@dice 1d4} and add the number rolled to the ability check.

entries.name: Storm's Boon
entries: You have {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Lightning damage.

entries.name: Storm Magic
entries: You know the {@spell Thunderclap|XPHB} cantrip. When you reach character level 3, you also always have the {@spell Gust of Wind|XPHB} spell prepared. You can cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in that way when you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also cast it using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells (choose when you select this feat).

entries.name: Spells of the Mark
entries: If you have the Spellcasting or Pact Magic class feature, the spells on the Mark of Storm Spells table are added to that feature's spell list.
